context.project: XH-202630 科研文献智能助手 — 领域知识个性化生成与多智能体协同决策系统研究
context.milestone: M1 / FM1：项目骨架与基础设施就绪
context.requirement: 创建5个TypeScript类型定义文件（types/paper.ts、types/user.ts、types/analysis.ts、types/agent.ts、types/common.ts），覆盖前端全部业务域的类型需求，包括论文、用户画像、分析结果、Agent状态、通用响应等类型，所有interface使用export导出，枚举值使用PascalCase，字段命名使用camelCase（与TypeScript规范一致），同时定义与后端JSON snake_case字段的映射注释

reference_docs.path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md
reference_docs.purpose: 附录A：TypeScript类型定义完整参考，包含Paper/UserProfile/AnalysisResult/AgentState等全部interface

reference_docs.path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md
reference_docs.purpose: 第9章状态管理规范：Store中使用的类型定义

reference_docs.path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md

reference_docs.purpose: 第7节数据库设计：枚举值定义（education_level/knowledge_level/preferred_style等）
跨系统字段映射：Java camelCase ↔ Python/JSON snake_case

existing_implementations.description: task03创建的Axios实例，响应拦截器引用了ApiResponse<T>类型

existing_implementations.file_path: docs/frontend/前端模块系统架构文档.md
existing_implementations.description: 附录A定义了全部TypeScript类型，是本次任务的直接参考

relevant_modules.name: types/common.ts
relevant_modules.responsibility: 通用类型定义：API统一响应、分页响应

key_interfaces.name: ApiResponse<T>
key_interfaces.signature: interface ApiResponse<T> { code: number; message: string; data: T; timestamp: number }

key_interfaces.name: PageResponse<T>
key_interfaces.signature: interface PageResponse<T> { items: T[]; total: number; page: number; size: number; totalPages: number }

relevant_modules.name: types/paper.ts
relevant_modules.responsibility: 论文相关类型：论文实体、筛选参数

key_interfaces.name: Paper
key_interfaces.signature: interface Paper { paperId, title, authors, abstract, year, venue?, keywords?, citationCount?, pdfUrl?, score?, recommendReason? }

key_interfaces.name: FilterParams
key_interfaces.signature: interface FilterParams { yearFrom?, yearTo?, venue?, minCitations?, sort? }

relevant_modules.name: types/user.ts
relevant_modules.responsibility: 用户相关类型：用户画像、登录响应、画像响应

key_interfaces.name: UserProfile
key_interfaces.signature: interface UserProfile { educationLevel, researchField, knowledgeLevel, preferredStyle }
key_interfaces.description: 用户画像4维度，枚举值类型约束

key_interfaces.name: LoginResponse
key_interfaces.signature: interface LoginResponse { token, userId, username, hasProfile }

key_interfaces.name: ProfileResponse
key_interfaces.signature: interface ProfileResponse { educationLevel, researchField, knowledgeLevel, preferredStyle }

relevant_modules.name: types/analysis.ts
relevant_modules.responsibility: 分析相关类型：分析结果、结构化分析、对比结果、引用、矛盾

key_interfaces.name: AnalysisResult
key_interfaces.signature: interface AnalysisResult { analysisId, status, type, result?, agentStates?, degraded?, degradedReason? }

key_interfaces.name: StructuredAnalysis
key_interfaces.signature: interface StructuredAnalysis { researchQuestion, coreMethod, keyExperiments, coreFindings, limitations, plainExplanation? }

key_interfaces.name: CompareResult
key_interfaces.signature: interface CompareResult { table: CompareRow[], summary, conflicts: Conflict[] }

key_interfaces.name: Conflict
key_interfaces.signature: interface Conflict { description, possibleReason, papers: string[] }

key_interfaces.name: CompareRow
key_interfaces.signature: interface CompareRow { dimension: string; values: string[] }

relevant_modules.name: types/agent.ts
relevant_modules.responsibility: Agent相关类型：Agent状态、流程图数据

key_interfaces.name: AgentState
key_interfaces.signature: interface AgentState { name, status, progress?, intermediateResult?, durationMs?, error? }

key_interfaces.name: FlowData
key_interfaces.signature: interface FlowData { nodes: FlowNode[]; links: FlowLink[] }

key_interfaces.name: FlowNode
key_interfaces.signature: interface FlowNode { name, label, x, y }

functional_requirements.description: 创建types/common.ts：定义ApiResponse<T>（code: number, message: string, data: T, timestamp: number）和PageResponse<T>（items: T[], total: number, page: number, size: number, totalPages: number），两个interface均使用export导出
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: ApiResponse和PageResponse类型可被api/index.ts和Store正确导入使用

functional_requirements.description: 创建types/paper.ts：定义Paper interface（paperId: string, title: string, authors: string[], abstract: string, year: number, venue?: string, keywords?: string[], citationCount?: number, pdfUrl?: string, score?: number, recommendReason?: string）和FilterParams interface（yearFrom?: number, yearTo?: number, venue?: string, minCitations?: number, sort?: 'relevance' | 'year' | 'citations'），均使用export导出
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: Paper和FilterParams类型可被paperStore和PaperCard组件正确导入使用

functional_requirements.description: 创建types/user.ts：定义UserProfile interface（educationLevel: 'undergraduate' | 'master' | 'phd' | 'faculty', researchField: string, knowledgeLevel: 'beginner' | 'intermediate' | 'advanced' | 'expert', preferredStyle: 'simple' | 'balanced' | 'technical'）、LoginResponse interface（token: string, userId: string, username: string, hasProfile: boolean）、ProfileResponse interface（educationLevel: string, researchField: string, knowledgeLevel: string, preferredStyle: string），均使用export导出。UserProfile的枚举字段使用联合字面量类型而非string，确保类型安全
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: UserProfile/LoginResponse/ProfileResponse类型可被userStore和UserProfileForm组件正确导入使用，枚举值有类型约束

functional_requirements.description: 创建types/analysis.ts：定义AnalysisResult interface（analysisId: string, status: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed', type: 'paper_analysis' | 'compare' | 'report', result?: { report?: string, citations?: Citation[], analysis?: StructuredAnalysis, comparison?: CompareResult }, agentStates?: AgentState[], degraded?: boolean, degradedReason?: string）、StructuredAnalysis interface（researchQuestion: string, coreMethod: string, keyExperiments: string, coreFindings: string, limitations: string, plainExplanation?: string）、CompareResult interface（table: CompareRow[], summary: string, conflicts: Conflict[]）、CompareRow interface（dimension: string, values: string[]）、Citation interface（paperId: string, text: string, location: string）、Conflict interface（description: string, possibleReason: string, papers: string[]），均使用export导出。AnalysisResult需从agent.ts导入AgentState类型
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: AnalysisResult等6个类型可被sessionStore和AnalysisCard/CompareTable组件正确导入使用

functional_requirements.description: 创建types/agent.ts：定义AgentState interface（name: string, status: 'waiting' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed', progress?: number, intermediateResult?: string, durationMs?: number, error?: string）、FlowData interface（nodes: FlowNode[], links: FlowLink[]）、FlowNode interface（name: string, label: string, x: number, y: number）、FlowLink interface（source: string, target: string），均使用export导出
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: AgentState/FlowData/FlowNode/FlowLink类型可被agentStore和AgentFlowChart组件正确导入使用

functional_requirements.description: 所有interface字段命名使用camelCase（TypeScript规范），与后端JSON的snake_case字段通过Axios响应拦截器自动转换。在每个interface上方添加JSDoc注释说明对应的JSON字段名（如 @field paperId ↔ paper_id），方便开发者理解跨系统映射
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 每个interface有JSDoc注释标注JSON字段映射关系

field_naming.rule: TypeScript interface字段使用camelCase，后端JSON使用snake_case，Axios响应拦截器自动转换

cross_system_consistency.data_flow: 后端JSON(snake_case) → Axios拦截器转换 → TypeScript类型(camelCase) → Store/组件使用

typescript.file_name: camelCase.ts（类型文件：paper.ts / user.ts / analysis.ts / agent.ts / common.ts）
typescript.enum_value: PascalCase（联合字面量类型使用小写字符串值，如 'undergraduate' | 'master'）

frontend.rule: types/目录为基础设施层，被所有其他层引用（Store/Component/API/Composable）

frontend.approach: 类型定义本身不涉及错误处理，但AnalysisResult.status和AgentState.status包含错误状态枚举

forbidden_actions.reason: 必须输出完整可执行代码
类型安全约束，所有字段必须明确类型
TypeScript规范要求camelCase，JSON转换由Axios拦截器处理
避免引入无关变更，后续任务会更新import引用
项目规范使用联合字面量类型（union literal types），如 'undergraduate' | 'master'

forbidden_actions.action: 在types/目录创建除5个指定文件外的其他文件
forbidden_actions.reason: 当前M1里程碑仅需5个类型文件

unit_tests.description: 验证所有5个类型文件可正确导入，interface类型定义完整，枚举值类型约束有效

verification_commands.expected_result: TypeScript编译无错误，所有类型定义合法
构建成功，类型文件正确编译

acceptance_criteria.criterion: types/paper.ts：Paper和FilterParams定义完整，可选字段使用?标记
types/user.ts：UserProfile枚举字段使用联合字面量类型，LoginResponse和ProfileResponse定义完整
